segments.text: That's the lateral air game right there
segments.original_text: といえばこの空中横機動力

segments.text: By hitting just the first hit of the second nair
segments.original_text: 2回目の空Nを一段目だけ当てることによって

segments.text: He builds up the edge trap
segments.original_text: 外に運ぶ展開を作り上げる
崖つかまり一本に空N直接こずけに

segments.text: Yeah, you see this combo all the time
segments.original_text: いやーこれよく見かける

full_text: That's the lateral air game right there Yeah Three back nairs By hitting just the first hit of the second nair He builds up the edge trap Ledge grab into direct nair Then down air Yeah, you see this combo all the time

corrections.original: クエヌを一段ともに取れる
corrections.corrected: 空Nを一段目だけ当てる

corrections.original: 捕まり一本にクエヌ直接
corrections.corrected: 崖つかまり一本に空N直接
